skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 30 normal attack(s). Affects all allies. Hit Rate ▲ 5.44% for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Hit Rate is an inert stat in the sim (no accuracy model); deliberately dropped per hard rule 4.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 30 normal attack(s). Affects all allies with a Submachine Gun. Hit Rate ▲ 3.79% for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Hit Rate inert in sim; deliberately dropped per hard rule 4.

skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 30 normal attack(s). Affects self. ATK ▲ 50.06% for 5 sec.
skill1.note: trigger hitCount 30, target self, atkPct 50.06 / 5s. At SMG cadence (~1.5s per 30 hits) this is effectively permanent; faithful.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Critical Damage ▲ 32.99% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: trigger fullBurstEnter, target allies, critDamagePct 32.99 / 10s. Exact match.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self. Critical Rate ▲ 30.1% for 10 sec. Attack Damage ▲ 23.7% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: trigger fullBurstEnter, target self, critRatePct 30.1 + attackDamagePct 23.7 / 10s. Exact match.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects 1 ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK (except the skill user; including the skill user if there are not enough allies). Critical Rate ▲ 85.42% for 1 round(s).
skill2.note: trigger fullBurstEnter, target alliesTopAtk count 1 excludeSelf:true, critRatePct 85.42 / 1.5s. 'for 1 round' approximated as 1.5s (one SR carry shot — the Miranda crit-snapshot for RH/Alice). excludeSelf added 2026-07-17 per 'except the skill user'.

burst.kitLine: Affects 2 ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK (except the skill user; including the skill user if there are not enough allies). ATK ▲ 40.4% for 10 sec. Critical Damage ▲ 56.23% for 10 sec.
burst.note: trigger burstCast, target alliesTopAtk count 2 excludeSelf:true, atkPct 40.4 + critDamagePct 56.23 / 10s. Exact match; excludeSelf added 2026-07-17.

documentedConfounds.text: Both S1 Hit Rate lines (allies 5.44%, SMG allies 3.79%) dropped — Hit Rate is inert in the sim (no accuracy model).
documentedConfounds.why: Hit Rate has no effect on damage in the sim; dropping it is correct and cannot shift DPS.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 '1 round' crit-rate buff on 1 top-ATK ally modeled as 1.5s (one SR carry shot approximation).
documentedConfounds.why: Deliberate, documented approximation of the Miranda crit-snapshot window for RH/Alice. Unit is MODEL_ONLY (never fielded, no board data) so no measured gap exists to explain; the approximation is the intended model.

documentedConfounds.text: F0 BASIS MISMATCH: override models the TREASURE kit (owner screenshot); base kit differs (burst targets 2 vs base 1; S1 self-ATK line is treasure-only).
documentedConfounds.why: CONFIRMED 2026-07-17: DB favorite-item prose now matches the screenshot-derived override line-for-line. Resolved; no residual gap.

documentedConfounds.text: alliesTopAtk excludeSelf was silently ignored before 2026-07-17; now fixed on both S2 (count 1) and burst (count 2).
documentedConfounds.why: Fixed 2026-07-17. Board-neutral anyway: Miranda is a low-ATK support so top-N selection almost never included her. Not board-measured.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Miranda's TREASURE kit (confirmed matching DB prose 2026-07-17): S1 self ATK 50.06%/5s on hitCount 30 (effectively permanent at SMG cadence), S2 on Full Burst enter (allies critDmg 32.99%, self critRate 30.1 + AD 23.7, 1 top-ATK ally critRate 85.42% as a 1.5s snapshot), and burst 2 top-ATK allies ATK 40.4% + critDmg 56.23%/10s. Both S1 Hit Rate lines are deliberately dropped as inert. The '1 round' → 1.5s approximation on the S2 crit-snapshot is the only non-literal modeling choice; excludeSelf was fixed 2026-07-17. Unit is MODEL_ONLY with no board data.
